title: Better Ping
description: Now ping is not just some dashes, but beautiful squares with numbers.
body:
EN: This resource pack replaces the ping texture with cubes with numbers.

**⚠ Does not fully work with  [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabr)!**


RU: Этот ресурспак заменяет текстуру пинга на красивые кубики с циферками

**⚠ Не полностью работает, если вы используете [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabr)!**
![gregrea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be3dc3d8cc04168894f0866db74c06b7b6eb26a7.png)
